title: Current PriMock57 public API attempt
blocker: PM57-d1c02 and PM57-d1c03 generated successfully, but judge calls first timed out and then hit OpenRouter's free-model daily cap again on the June 30 11:06 UTC retry.
next: Add OpenRouter credits, pass a local provider key with --key-env, or configure a faster second judge, then resume the cached run toward at least 30 completed PriMock57 cases before publishing any ranked current row.
unblockAsk: Have a non-capped OpenRouter key or credits? Keep the key in your shell, resume the public API runner, and submit aggregate scores only after at least 30 PriMock57 cases are scored.
resumeCommand:
export OPENROUTER_API_KEY=...
npm run bench:public-api -- \
  --base-url https://scribe-bench.vercel.app \
  --dataset data/primock57/cases \
  --system openrouter-nemotron-3-ultra-public-api \
  --repeats 1 \
  --limit 30 \
  --key-env OPENROUTER_API_KEY \
  --out leaderboard/_public-api-pending.json
rawNotesPolicy: Raw generated notes remain in the ignored local progress cache and are not committed.
